nodes.name: Apple Inc.
nodes.summary: Global consumer electronics and software company based in Cupertino; known for iPhone, Mac, and services.

nodes.name: Total revenue
nodes.summary: Latest quarter revenue grew year over year; services and wearables added incremental contribution.

nodes.name: iPhone product line
nodes.summary: Flagship smartphone family; still the core pillar of hardware revenue.

nodes.name: Services segment
nodes.summary: Subscriptions and high-margin businesses: App Store, iCloud, Apple Music, and more.

nodes.name: Supply chain risk
nodes.summary: Geopolitics and manufacturing concentration create delivery and cost uncertainty.

nodes.name: Greater China
nodes.summary: Major sales market and manufacturing ecosystem; sensitive to demand swings.

nodes.name: Gross margin
nodes.summary: Product mix improvements help keep overall profitability strong.

nodes.name: On-device AI
nodes.summary: Generative capabilities on devices for privacy and differentiated experiences.

nodes.name: Regulatory compliance
nodes.summary: Antitrust, privacy, and regional laws affecting platforms and distribution.

nodes.name: Cash position
nodes.summary: Strong liquidity backing buybacks, dividends, and R&D.
